headline: inPACT daily-flow / CycleBoard UI: local-state task & routine tracker with delta-kernel (3001) sync, signal banner, and 4-step onboarding

capabilities.invoke: Click complete on an A-Z task
capabilities.notes: completeTask(id): sets status Completed, logs activity, persists via stateManager.update, re-renders
createTask() reads modal inputs and appends a new A-Z task to state

capabilities.invoke: Click delete on a task (confirm prompt)
capabilities.notes: deleteTask(id): confirm-gated filter out of state.AZTask

capabilities.invoke: Check off a time block in the day plan
Toggle a routine step / mark routine complete

capabilities.notes: 4-step wizard goStep(0..3) -> finish(); quickStart()/prefillStarter() seed initial state
handleFileImport(event): reads a file and replaces the full local state blob; bulk overwrite
AtlasAPI.putCycleBoardState() pushes the full inPACT state blob to delta-kernel:3001 (offline-first, fails silently)

capabilities.invoke: Click an action button on the signal banner
capabilities.notes: resolveSignal() POSTs to delta-kernel /api/signals/:id/resolve with chosen action_id; bearer-token auth

capabilities.invoke: Mark a Cortex prepared item done in Atlas AI panel
capabilities.notes: handlePreparedTask -> AtlasAPI.completeBackendTask() PUT /api/tasks/:id status DONE on delta-kernel
AtlasAPI.getHealth() polls delta-kernel:3001 health to set online/offline; safe read
